warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Band Row Rotate Press
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Hang Power Clean
3 Tall Clean
10 Strict Press
0530 Specific Warm Up
2 mins on Rower - Slow - Moderate - Faster
J-Hook - Box seat to stand
Empty Bar RDL
3 Deadlifts @ 50-70-90

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
4x6 | *Keep Quads engaged at all times.
*Think Break & Pull apart Bar | E2MOM 12 mins

00:00 6 @ 50%
03:00 6 @ 60%
HOLD 4x6
04:00 6 @ 65%
06:00 6 @ 65%
08:00 6 @ 65%
10:00 6 @ 65%

hypertrophy.reasoning: Build pulling strength and arm hypertrophy while allowing CNS recovery from heavy pressing/deadlifting.
